zh.lifeSummary: Felicia De Mayenne於大約1104年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭。她於大約1095年與Brian De Longworth結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Felicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Felix . It was popular in Britain in the medieval period (with the vernacular forms Felice , Felis ), but by the 16th century it had become confused with Phyllis . In modern times it is in only occasional use.

en.lifeSummary: Felicia De Mayenne was born about 1104, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married Brian De Longworth about 1095. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Felicia De Mayenne est née environ 1104, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Brian De Longworth environ 1095. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: Felicia De Mayenneは約1104年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた。約1095年にBrian De Longworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Felicia De Mayenne(은)는 대략 1104년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1095년 Brian De Longworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.
